violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving above the pizza prep area and the cupboards and shelving under the cappuccino machine are chipping and pocking making them no longer a cleanable surface. Front of the cupboards under the pop machine are held with duct tape and is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood vents need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Utensils being dried on cloth towel on the drain pan of the 3 comp sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls and ceiling in the kitchen has excess build-up of dust and debris and need to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CFSM is expired and no other employee has a food service manager certificate.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee returned to food prep from doing dishes and did not wash hand before donning gloves. *Redirected while on-site.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Bags of pizza meats and hamburger patties are not date marked with open date. -Nacho cheese in pizza table is not date marked.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Could not locate thermometer in mini refrigerator or combination refrigerator. *Ensure thermometers are available in all refrigeration units to facilitate monitoring.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost at back interior of black mini fridge. -Frost and crumb debris at bottom and back interior of upright freezer with some residue at door front. -Dust at fans and residue at upper interior of pizza table bottom compartment. -Dust build up on black upright fan in kitchen. -Dust build up at walk in cooler fans.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a ware wash sink. -Employee washed hands at 3 comp sink (after being directed to wash hands. *Discussed hand washing is to be done at hand sink only.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use creamer portions on floor near hand sink. (COS)--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -2 stacks of pizza trays and a stack of clam shells at pizza ovens were not stored inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towels were out at hand sink (thought to have run out last night). *COS-Employee stocked dispenser immediately.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Sani Bucket made to greater than 100ppm Chlorine solution with soap in solution. -Sani Sink found at greater than 400ppm Quat.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
